summary: Discover actor-visible Superset analytics context without exposing raw backend tools.
developer_notes: Native Superset REST discovery is provider-owned and bounded by workspace allowlists.

summary: Answer governed analytics questions through provider-owned semantic execution without accepting raw SQL.
developer_notes: Raw SQL is not an agent input and is not exposed as a backend mapping.

summary: Create an unsaved chart preview from governed metric and visualization intent.
developer_notes: Preview creation returns a reviewable artifact and does not save or publish a Superset chart.

summary: Request approval to save or update a Superset chart from a governed preview.
developer_notes: Publishing is approval-gated; execution is not performed without a valid grant.

summary: Prepare a reviewable dashboard draft or update proposal without publishing.
developer_notes: Dashboard drafts are preview-only; publication remains outside this capability.

summary: Prepare an approval-gated virtual dataset or semantic dataset draft without accepting raw SQL.
developer_notes: The provider owns query derivation and approval controls; agents cannot submit raw SQL.
